    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractStrategy
     
    Action
    Represent the actions that are taking place during a phase
    AggressiveStrategy
    Aggressive strategy class
    Arrow
    Able to form a arrow shape and draw it on the map
    AttackComponents
     
    BenevolentStrategy
    Benevolent Strategy class
    Card
    Define classe of Card
    CardController
    Handle event when user interact with CardView
    CardModel
    Observable of CardView Save the info that CardView needed
    CardType
    Card Enums for card exchange.
    CardView
    Responsible for visualizing the card exchange view, show useful info to user Corresponding Observable subject is CardModel Singleton pattern
    CheaterStrategy
    Cheater Strategy class
    Continent
    Define class of a continent The following is only base code, further features need to be added
    Country
    this is Country class for MapEditor
    Country
    Define class of a country The following is only base code, further features need to be added Note: 1.
    CountryController
    Handle event when user interact with the country, pass it to CountryView
    CountryController
    Controller class for Country class in map editor Bounded with CountryEditor.fxml
    CountryView
    Responsible for visualizing the Country object, show useful info to user Corresponding Observable subject is Country
    Driver
    The entrance of the application, like the main() method
    Edge
    this is Edge class for MapEditor
    FileInfoMenu
    Instruction: Within Model's loadFile() method if file is valid call setValidationResult(true, validInfo) else call setValidationResult(false, invalidInfo) then call update();
    FileInfoMenuView
    Observer class, display the selected file relative info
    GeneralComponents
     
    HumanStrategy
    Human strategy class
    InvalidMapException
    This class is used to handle Invalid map exceptions.
    Map
    Load the map UI from fxml file, able to initialize, show, hide and close it
    MapController
    Handle event when user interacts UI during the map stage
    MapEditor
    Driver class to start up map editor only
    MapModel
     
    MapValidator
    Map validator.
    Menu
    Load the map UI from fxml file, able to initialize, show, hide and close it
    MenuController
    Handle event when user interact with the menu, pass it to Model
    MenuManager
     
    Message
    Message class the message transformation between model and view
    Model
    Define Observable class ...
    NumPlayerMenu
    Instruction: Within Model's loadFile() method if file is valid call setVisible(true); call setValidationResult(false, "Total Player: NONE") call setMaxNumPlayer(int) else call setVisible(false) then call update(); Within Model's initiatePlayer() method if player number is valid call setValidationResult(true, "") else call setValidationResult(false, "invalid Info") then call update()
    NumPlayerMenuView
    Display the player number relative menu components
    Phase
    Observable Phase class, store 1) the name of the game phase currently being played 2) the current player's name 3) information about actions that are taking place during this phase
    PhaseView
    Observer Phase class, store 1) the name of the game phase currently being played 2) the current player's name 3) information about actions that are taking place during this phase
    Player
    Define class of a player The following is only base code, further features need to be added
    PlayerBehaviorStrategy
    the interface of player strategy
    PlayerManager
     
    PlayersWorldDomination
    Observable PlayerWorldDomination class, display 1) the percentage of the map controlled by every player 2) the continents controlled by every player 3) the total number of armies owned by every player
    PlayersWorldDominationView
    Observer PlayerWorldDominationView class, display 1) the percentage of the map controlled by every player 2) the continents controlled by every player 3) the total number of armies owned by every player
    RandomStrategy
    Random strategy class
    SleepTime
    thread sleep time
    STATE
    all the state in the RISK game
    StrategyFactory
    Return a correspond strategy according the param
    Tool
    tools
    TournamentModel
    Tournament model to start tournament mode game
    View
    Model class for View (root_pane) in map editor In order to unify model.Model notify mechanism, implements Observer to receive file validation info
    View
    View, support user interaction, do partial user input validation Corresponding Observable subject is Model
    ViewController
    Controller class for View object
    WorkerThread
    new thread to automatically run the strategy execute method
    Writer
    this class is to generate standard map file
